ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the university is located */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size category of the university (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "english_spoken" INTEGER /* Indicator if English is spoken (1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university associated with the metrics */,
  "fte_students" INTEGER /* Full-time equivalent (FTE) students enrolled */,
  "students_per_staff" REAL /* Number of students per staff member */,
  "international_students" REAL /* Percentage of international students */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Overall ratio for ranking calculation */,
  "industry_collaborations" INTEGER /* Number of industry collaborations */,
  "research_output" INTEGER /* Number of research outputs */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total citation count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_metrics_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking score entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university for which the score is recorded */,
  "overall" REAL /* Overall ranking score */,
  "teaching" REAL /* Score related to teaching quality */,
  "research" REAL /* Score related to research output */,
  "citations" REAL /* Score based on citations */,
  "industry_income" REAL /* Income generated from industry collaborations */,
  "global_rank" INTEGER /* Global ranking position */,
  "regional_rank" INTEGER /* Regional ranking position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_scores_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_details" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_details_country_name FOREIGN KEY ("country_name") REFERENCES universities ("country")
)

CREATE TABLE "continent_details" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_continent_details_continent_name FOREIGN KEY ("continent_name") REFERENCES universities ("continent")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" TEXT /* Specific data points downloaded by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blog_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blog post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the blog post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the blog post */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the blog post was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the blog post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_programs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)
